name: onekey-manager
documentation:
# one-key
My own password manager.

classes.name: one_key.User.User

methods.name: one_key.User.User.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a new User instance.

Args:
    username: The username of the user.
    key: The key to the user's credentials.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the username or key is invalid.

methods.name: one_key.User.User.__eq__
documentation:
Checks if two User objects are equal.

Args:
    other: The other User object.

Returns:
    bool: True if they are equal, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.User.User.sign_in
documentation:
Signs the user in. 

Args:
    key: The key to the user's credentials.

Returns:
    bool: True if the user successfully signed in, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.User.User.sign_out
documentation:
Signs the user out.

Returns:
    bool: True if the user successfully signed out, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.User.User.is_signed_in
documentation:
Checks if the user is signed in.

Returns:
    bool: True if the user is signed in, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.User.User.get_key
documentation:
Gets the user's key if they are signed in.

Returns:
    str: The user's key if they are signed in, None otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.User.User.set_key
documentation:
Sets the user's key if they are signed in.

Args:
    key: The user's new key.

Returns:
    bool: True if the new key was set successfully, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.User.User.get_username
documentation:
Gets the user's username.

Returns:
    str: The user's username.

methods.name: one_key.User.User.set_username
documentation:
Sets the user's username.

Args:
    username: The user's new username.

Returns:
    bool: True if the new username was set succesfully, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.User.User.get_credential
documentation:
Get a credential for a website from the user's collection of credentials.

Args:
    website: The website to get the credential for.

Returns:
    Credential: the credential if it exists and the user is signed in, None otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.User.User.add_credential
documentation:
Add a credential to the user's collection of credentials.

Args:
    credential: The user's new credential to be added.

Returns:
    bool: True if the credential was added successfully, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.User.User.remove_credential
documentation:
Remove a credential from the user's collection of credentials.

Args:
    website: The website of the credential to be removed.

Returns:
    bool: True if the credential was removed successfully, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.User.User.list_credentials
documentation:
List the user's credentials.

Returns:
    str: The list of the user's credentials as a string.

A class to represent a user of the password manager.

Attributes:
    __username: The username of the user.
    __key: The key to the user's credentials.
    __signed_in: True if the user is signed in, false otherwise.
    __credentials: Collection of the user's credentials.

classes.name: one_key.Credential.Credential

methods.name: one_key.Credential.Credential.__init__
documentation:
Initializes a new Credential instance.

Args:
    website: The website the credential is used for.
    username: The username of the credential.
    password: The password of the credential.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the website, username, or password is invalid.

methods.name: one_key.Credential.Credential.__eq__
documentation:
Checks if two Credential objects are equal.

Args:
    other: The other Credential object.

Returns:
   bool: True if they are equal, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.Credential.Credential.get_website
documentation:
Gets the website the credential is used for.

Returns:
    str: The website the credential is used for.

methods.name: one_key.Credential.Credential.set_website
documentation:
Sets the website the credential is used for.

Args:
    website: The website the credential is used for.

methods.name: one_key.Credential.Credential.get_username
documentation:
Gets the username of the credential.

Returns:
    str: The username of the credential.

methods.name: one_key.Credential.Credential.set_username
documentation:
Sets the username of the credential.

Args:
    username: The username to set the credential with.

methods.name: one_key.Credential.Credential.get_password
documentation:
Gets the password of the credential.

Returns:
    str: The password of the credential.

methods.name: one_key.Credential.Credential.set_password
documentation:
Sets the password of the credential.

Args:
    password: The password to set the credential with.

methods.name: one_key.Credential.Credential.__str__
documentation:
Returns the string representation of the credential.

Returns:
    str: The string representation of the credential.

A class to represent a login credential.

Attributes:
    __website: The website the credential is used for.
    __username: The username of the credential.
    __password: The password of the credential.

classes.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.__init__
documentation: Initializes a new PasswordManager instance.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.add_user
documentation:
Adds a user to the password manager.

Args:
    user: The user to add to the password manager.

Returns:
   bool: True if the user was successfully added, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.remove_user
documentation:
Removes a user from the password manager.

Args:
    username: The username of the user to remove.

Returns:
    bool: True if the user was successfully removed, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.get_num_users
documentation:
Gets the password manager's number of users.

Returns:
    int: The number of users.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.user_exists
documentation:
Checks if a username belongs to a valid user.

Args:
    username: The username of the user to check.

Returns:
    bool: True if the username belongs to a valid user, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.__get_user
documentation:
Gets a user from the password manager's users dictionary.

Args:
    username: The username of the user to get.

Returns:
    User: The user whose username matches the parameter 'username'. None if the user
    does not exist.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.__get_curr_user
documentation:
Gets the currently signed in user.

Returns:
    User: The currently signed in user.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.__set_curr_user
documentation: Sets the currently signed in user.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.get_curr_user_username
documentation:
Get the currently signed in user's username.

Returns:
    str: The currently signed in user's username.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.anyone_signed_in
documentation:
Checks if anyone is signed in.

Returns:
    bool: True if someone is signed in, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.sign_in
documentation:
Signs in a user of the password manager.

Args:
    username: The user's username.
    key: The user's key.

Returns:
    bool: True if the user was successfully signed in, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.sign_out
documentation:
Signs out a user of the password manager.

Args:
    username: The user's username.

Returns:
    bool: True if the user was successfully signed out, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.is_signed_in
documentation:
Checks if a user is signed in.

Args:
    username (str): The user's username.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.get_key
documentation:
Gets a user's key.

Args:
    username: The user's username.

Returns:
    str: The user's key if they are signed in, None otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.set_key
documentation:
Sets a user's key.

Args:
    username: The user's username.
    key: The user's new key.

Returns:
    bool: True if the user's new key was set successfully, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.set_username
documentation:
Set's a user's username.

Args:
    old_username: The user's old username.
    new_username: The user's new username.

Returns:
    bool: True if the user's new username was successfully set, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.get_credential
documentation:
Get's a user's credential for a website.

Args:
    username: The user's username.
    website: The website of the credential to get.

Returns:
    Credential: The user's credential for the given website. None if a credential for the
    given website doesn't exist.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.add_credential
documentation:
Adds a credential to the user's dictionary of credentials.

Args:
    username: The user's username.
    credential: The credential to add.

Returns:
    bool: True if the credential was added successfully, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.remove_credential
documentation:
Removes a credential from the user's dictionary of credentials.

Args:
    username: The user's username.
    website: The website of the credential to remove.

Returns:
    bool: True if the credential was removed successfully, False otherwise.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.list_credentials
documentation:
Lists a user's credentials.

Args:
    username (str): The user's username.

Returns:
    str: A list of the user's credentials as a string.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.save_data
documentation: Serializes and saves the password manager state.

methods.name: one_key.PasswordManager.PasswordManager.load_data
documentation: Deserializes and loads the password manager state from data/password_manager.pkl

A class to represent a password manager.

Attributes:
    __users: The dictionary of users.
    __curr_user: The currently signed in user.

functions.name: one_key.one_key.bad_str
documentation:
Checks if a string (for a website, username, or password) is an unacceptable string.
An unacceptable string is empty or contains spaces.

Args:
    in_str (str): The string to check.

Returns:
    bool: True if the string is unacceptable, False otherwise.

functions.name: one_key.one_key.prompt_y_n
documentation:
Prompts a yes or no message.

Args:
    msg (str): The prompt message.

Returns:
    bool: True if the user replied yes, False otherwise.

functions.name: one_key.one_key.prompt_password
documentation:
Prompts the user for a password. The password must not be blank and cannot contain spaces.

Args:
    msg (str): The prompt message.

Returns:
    str: The password entered by the user

functions.name: one_key.one_key.prompt_str
documentation:
Prompts the user for a string that doesn't need to be hidden.

Args:
    msg (str): The prompt message.

Returns:
    str: The user's response.

functions.name: one_key.one_key.print_success
documentation:
Prints a success message.

Args:
    msg (str): The success message.

functions.name: one_key.one_key.print_failure
documentation:
Prints a failure message.

Args:
    msg (str): The failure message.

functions.name: one_key.one_key.print_warning
documentation:
Prints a warning message

Args:
    msg (str): The warning message.

functions.name: one_key.one_key.main
documentation: Main entry point of the one_key application.

variables.name: one_key.one_key.MIN_USERS
documentation: min num users required to run commands other than --add-user
